name: lead-generation
description: Create a full lead generation system with offers and outreach scripts
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 3: Generate 3 lead-gen strategies (Value-First, Authority, Results-Led).
Step 4: For each strategy, include Primary Lead Magnet, Core Message, and CTA.
Step 5: Provide full Execution Plan: Landing Copy, Outreach (DM/Email), and Follow-up.
Step 6: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the conversion strategy.
